description: A pharmacist calls to complain that a batch of tablets appears discolored. A quality specialist must handle the complaint.

nodes.task_description: Log the product complaint in the quality management system, capturing all details.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a new complaint record with the product name, lot number, and description of the issue.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for the complaint sample to be returned from the pharmacy for investigation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a return shipping label and instructions for the pharmacist.

nodes.task_description: Review the retention samples for the same batch to check for the discoloration issue.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent checks the retained samples and confirms that the discoloration is also present.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a formal quality investigation to determine the root cause of the discoloration.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent opens a new investigation record and links it to the product complaint.
